import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"API Root"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Access the root endpoint of the meshfed API to discover available API resources

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports multiple authentication methods: API User authentication or API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accept","in":"header","description":"This endpoint of meshObject API is individually <<versioning,versioned>>. Use `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.v1.hal+json` for this version of the endpoint.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.v1.hal+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"200","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.v1.hal+json":{"schema":{"title":"apiRoot","required":["_links"],"type":"object","properties":{"_links":{"type":"object","description":"All available <<index_links,Top-Level Links>> for the authenticated user."}}},"examples":{"apiRoot":{"value":"{\n  \"_links\" : {\n    \"metadata\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/metadata\"\n    },\n    \"meshobjects\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects\"\n    },\n    \"self\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api\"\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
